qry:select.name: Estado
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SEL13_ENTREV_REC.c_estado FROM SEL13_ENTREV_REC WHERE SEL13_ENTREV_REC.c_estado = {#SOURCE:@c_estado} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: Entrevistador
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT PER01.d_ape_y_nom , PER02.oi_personal_emp FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PER02, PER01_PERSONAL AS PER01, SEL13_ENTREV_REC AS ENTREV JOIN PER02.oi_personal INNER PER01.oi_personal, PER02.oi_personal_emp INNER ENTREV.oi_personal_emp WHERE 1=1 {%? (#FILTRO:@oi_personal_emp!='') {% AND SEL13_ENTREV_REC.oi_personal_emp = {#FILTRO:@oi_personal_emp} %} {% %} %} GROUP BY PER01.d_ape_y_nom , PER02.oi_personal_emp ORDER BY d_ape_y_nom ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: Entrevistas
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SEL13_ENTREV_REC.c_estado, SEL13_ENTREV_REC.oi_reclutado, SEL13_ENTREV_REC.oi_entrev_rec, SEL13_ENTREV_REC.f_fecha_hora_ent, SEL13_ENTREV_REC.t_comentario, SEL13_ENTREV_REC.d_ideal_para FROM SEL13_ENTREV_REC WHERE SEL13_ENTREV_REC.oi_personal_emp = {#SOURCE:@oi_personal_emp} {%? (#FILTRO:@f_desde!='') {% AND SEL13_ENTREV_REC.f_fecha_hora_ent >= {DateTime(#FILTRO:@f_desde)} %} {% %} %} {%? (#FILTRO:@f_hasta!='') {% AND SEL13_ENTREV_REC.f_fecha_hora_ent <= {DateTime(#FILTRO:@f_hasta)} %} {% %} %} {%? (#FILTRO:@c_estado!='') {% AND SEL13_ENTREV_REC.c_estado = {#FILTRO:@c_estado} %} {% %} %} ORDER BY f_fecha_hora_ent ASC, c_estado ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: Reclutado
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG04.d_puesto, SEL13R.oi_personal_emp, SEL13R.oi_postulante FROM SEL13_ENTREV_REC AS SEL13, SEL13_RECLUTADOS AS SEL13R, SEL02_REFERENCIAS AS SEL02, ORG04_PUESTOS AS ORG04 JOIN SEL13.oi_reclutado INNER SEL13R.oi_reclutado, SEL13R.oi_referencia INNER sel02.oi_referencia, SEL02.oi_puesto INNER ORG04.oi_puesto WHERE SEL13.oi_entrev_rec={#SOURCE:@oi_entrev_rec} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: DatosPersonal
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER01.d_ape_y_nom , PER02.e_numero_legajo FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS AS SEL13 , PER01_PERSONAL AS PER01 , PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PER02 JOIN SEL13.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02.oi_personal_emp , PER02.oi_personal INNER PER01.oi_personal WHERE SEL13.oi_personal_emp= {#SOURCE:@oi_personal_emp} GROUP BY SEL13.oi_personal_emp , PER01.d_ape_y_nom , PER02.e_numero_legajo ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: DatosPostulantes
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT SEL01.d_postulante , SEL01.c_postulante FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS AS SEL13 , SEL01_POSTULANTE AS SEL01 JOIN SEL13.oi_postulante INNER SEL01.oi_postulante WHERE SEL13.oi_postulante= {#SOURCE:@oi_postulante} GROUP BY SEL01.d_postulante , SEL01.c_postulante
')/ROWS/ROW
